Node started: Analyze the sentence structure to identify all potential noun phrase antecedents for the pronouns 'he' and 'his'. Determine if the syntax allows for multiple interpretations (ambiguity) or if grammatical constraints favor one specific antecedent (the investigator vs. the witness).

Node started: Evaluate the semantic plausibility of the two possible interpretations: 1) The investigator was late and got stuck in traffic, or 2) The witness was late and got stuck in traffic.
